description: The identifying number of the lot or batch to which a recorded harvest, input, or seeding belongs.
probe_semantics: Deliver the recorded lot number value for the subject record, or no value when no lot number was recorded.

punts: field declared in a PHP attribute plugin's buildFieldDefinitions, not a YAML file
proposed by openai:gpt-5.6-terra (propose-terms); PROVISIONAL until first_pack_seal is filled by a real sealed recording

description: A measured quantity classified as material in a farm record.
probe_semantics: Delivers the classification value of the measured quantity recorded on the log, so an assertion can determine whether that quantity is material.

punts: quantity bundle fields (e.g. its *_type reference) live in the quantity module, outside this file
also surfaced by role-equivalence class 174451ff9f353625 (features: birth, input)
proposed by openai:gpt-5.6-terra (propose-terms); PROVISIONAL until first_pack_seal is filled by a real sealed recording

description: Delete a recorded log, removing it from the source together with the quantities it owns.
probe_semantics: Perform the deletion of the recorded log at the source's write boundary; the log ceases to exist and no value is delivered.

punts: AUTHORED for the quantity-ownership-cascade batch (MetaCoding-io6); no propose-terms row proposed this action (delete verbs are not surfaced by declarative-config mining)
clone is deliberately NOT in this batch
PROVISIONAL until first_pack_seal is filled by a real sealed recording

description: Delete a recorded quantity, removing a single measurement from the source.

then: the quantity is no longer delivered

probe_semantics: Perform the deletion of the recorded quantity at the source's write boundary; the quantity ceases to exist and no value is delivered.

punts: AUTHORED for the quantity-ownership-cascade batch (MetaCoding-io6); no propose-terms row proposed this action
clone is deliberately NOT in this batch

flow-DSL cannot yet mint a quantity alias, so this action is adapter-reachable but not yet flow-reachable (record_log does not alias its owned quantities) — the adapter method and operation contract are honest plumbing awaiting a quantity-aliasing follow-up
PROVISIONAL until first_pack_seal is filled by a real sealed recording
